**The idea**
What should the slime do, become, or notice?

**Which phase does it fit?**
- [ ] Phase 1 — richer offline behaviors (forms, sound, friendship, dreams/lore)
- [ ] Phase 2 — cloud dreamscape (weather, moon, summaries)
- [ ] Phase 3 — hardware add-ons (touch, RTC, environmental sensor, mic, speaker)
- [ ] Not sure

**Does it honor the philosophy?**
Stays calm, never punishes absence, offline-first. How does this idea fit that?
